title.en: Teaching LLDP to Speak YANG: The 802.1ABcu Data Model, Clause by Clause
title.zh: 让 LLDP 学会讲 YANG：逐条解读 802.1ABcu 数据模型

blocks.en: LLDP (Link Layer Discovery Protocol) lets an IEEE 802 LAN station advertise who it is and what it can do, so its neighbors can build a picture of the physical network topology. The base standard, IEEE Std 802.1AB, already let you manage LLDP through SNMP (Simple Network Management Protocol) MIBs (Management Information Bases). This amendment, IEEE Std 802.1ABcu-2021, adds a second, modern way to manage exactly the same protocol: YANG (Yet Another Next Generation), the IETF-defined data-modeling language published as IETF RFC 7950. The amendment does not change how LLDP works on the wire — it adds a formal YANG description of the configuration and operational data so tools speaking NETCONF (Network Configuration Protocol) or RESTCONF can configure and monitor LLDP. This lesson walks every clause the amendment touches.
blocks.zh: LLDP（链路层发现协议，Link Layer Discovery Protocol）让 IEEE 802 局域网中的站点对外通告自己的身份和能力，邻居据此构建网络物理拓扑图。基础标准 IEEE Std 802.1AB 已经允许通过 SNMP（简单网络管理协议）的 MIB（管理信息库）来管理 LLDP。本修订标准 IEEE Std 802.1ABcu-2021 又增加了一种现代化的管理方式：YANG（又一代数据建模语言，Yet Another Next Generation），它是 IETF 定义、以 IETF RFC 7950 发布的数据建模语言。本修订标准并不改变 LLDP 在链路上的工作方式，而是为其配置数据和运行数据增加了一份正式的 YANG 描述，使得使用 NETCONF（网络配置协议）或 RESTCONF 的工具能够配置和监控 LLDP。本课逐一讲解该修订标准触及的每个条款。

blocks.en: Mental model: think of LLDP as the protocol, and a management model (MIB or YANG) as a structured 'spreadsheet' describing every knob you can turn and every reading you can take. Clause 1.2 (Purpose) explicitly adds goal (e) to the base standard: 'Provide YANG configuration and operational models supporting Station and Media Access Control Connectivity Discovery.' Same LLDP, new management dialect.
blocks.zh: 可以这样理解：LLDP 是协议本身，而管理模型（MIB 或 YANG）则是一份结构化的“表格”，描述了你能调节的每个旋钮和能读取的每个数值。条款 1.2（目的）明确在基础标准中新增了目标 (e)：“提供支持站点与媒体访问控制连通性发现的 YANG 配置模型和运行模型。”同样的 LLDP，只是多了一种管理语言。

blocks.en: Clause 3.1 (Definitions) adds the three vocabulary words this amendment leans on. YANG is the IETF-defined data-modeling language (IETF RFC 7950). A YANG model is one or more YANG modules used to configure and monitor the managed element or system. A YANG module is the actual description of that data model: it defines a hierarchy of nodes usable for NETCONF-based (see IETF RFC 6241) and RESTCONF-based (see IETF RFC 8040) operations. Note the precision: a 'model' may be assembled from several 'modules,' and the 'module' is the concrete file of node definitions.
blocks.zh: 条款 3.1（定义）新增了本修订标准依赖的三个术语。YANG 是 IETF 定义的数据建模语言（IETF RFC 7950）。YANG 模型（YANG model）是用于配置和监控受管元素或系统的一个或多个 YANG 模块。YANG 模块（YANG module）则是该数据模型的具体描述：它定义了一套节点层次结构，可供基于 NETCONF（见 IETF RFC 6241）和基于 RESTCONF（见 IETF RFC 8040）的操作使用。请注意其精确性：一个“模型”可由若干“模块”组装而成，而“模块”是承载节点定义的具体文件。

blocks.en: Clause 5.3 (Required capabilities) wires YANG into conformance. It rewrites item n) so the fallback storage requirement triggers when neither SNMP nor YANG is supported, and inserts a new item o): if YANG is supported, the system shall conform to the LLDP management specifications in Clause 12 and shall implement the sections of the LLDP YANG module for the operating mode being implemented. In plain terms, YANG support is optional, but once you claim it, Clause 12 becomes binding.
blocks.zh: 条款 5.3（必备能力）把 YANG 纳入一致性要求。它改写了第 n) 项，使得“兜底存储能力”要求在 SNMP 与 YANG 都不被支持时才触发；并新增第 o) 项：如果支持 YANG，则系统应符合第 12 条中的 LLDP 管理规范，并应针对所实现的运行模式实现 LLDP YANG 模块的相应部分。简言之，是否支持 YANG 是可选的，但一旦声明支持，第 12 条就具有强制约束力。

blocks.en: Clause 9.2.5 (Per-Agent variables) is the one piece of LLDP-engine behavior this amendment retouches, specifically 9.2.5.6 msgTxHold. This variable is a multiplier of msgTxInterval that determines txTTL — the Time To Live carried in transmitted LLDP frames, telling neighbors how long to keep the received information before aging it out. The amendment restates that msgTxHold has a recommended default and can be changed by management to any value in its defined range. It matters here because the YANG model in Clause 12 surfaces exactly this knob as the configurable leaf message-tx-hold-multiplier.
blocks.zh: 条款 9.2.5（每代理变量）是本修订标准唯一重新修订的 LLDP 引擎行为部分，具体为 9.2.5.6 的 msgTxHold。该变量是 msgTxInterval 的乘数，用于确定 txTTL——即所发送 LLDP 帧中携带的生存时间（Time To Live），它告诉邻居在将所收信息老化清除前应保留多久。修订标准重申 msgTxHold 有一个推荐默认值，并可由管理操作在其规定范围内更改为任意值。它在此处重要，是因为第 12 条的 YANG 模型恰好把这个旋钮暴露为可配置叶子节点 message-tx-hold-multiplier。

blocks.en: Clause 12 (LLDP YANG definitions) is the heart of the amendment. Clause 12.1 (Internet Standard Management Framework) sets the ground rules: the YANG module uses the YANG language of IETF RFC 7950, and the hierarchy follows two principles — a URN (Uniform Resource Name) namespace per IEEE Std 802d (root 'ieee', then the standard, then the working group), and a tree of configuration and operational data structures. Clause 12.2 (Information model) explains that the YANG objects are derived from the LLDP TLVs (Type-Length-Value fields) and the agent-operation variables defined elsewhere in the base standard, presented as UML-like (Unified Modeling Language) diagrams where gray boxes are objects this standard defines and white boxes come from outside IEEE 802.1.
blocks.zh: 条款 12（LLDP YANG 定义）是修订标准的核心。条款 12.1（互联网标准管理框架）定下基本规则：YANG 模块使用 IETF RFC 7950 的 YANG 语言，其层次遵循两条原则——其一是按 IEEE Std 802d 定义的 URN（统一资源名称）命名空间（根为 “ieee”，其后是标准编号，再后是制定标准的工作组），其二是配置数据与运行数据结构构成的树。条款 12.2（信息模型）说明：YANG 对象源自 LLDP 的 TLV（类型-长度-值字段，Type-Length-Value）以及基础标准中别处定义的代理运行变量，并以类 UML（统一建模语言）图呈现，其中灰色框是本标准定义的对象，白色框来自 IEEE 802.1 之外。

blocks.en: The information model splits into two views. Clause 12.2.1 (LLDP UML) shows the per-agent or per-chassis objects: the YANG root hierarchy places the LLDP and LLDP-Port objects alongside IETF Interface Management. Clause 12.2.2 (LLDP Port UML) zooms into one port, where you find the configurable leaves (admin-status, tlvs-tx-enable, the timing multipliers, management-address-tx-port) and the read-only operational data (port-id, tx-statistics, rx-statistics, and the remote-systems-data table holding what neighbors advertised). Clause 12.3.1 (Structure of the ieee802-dot1ab-lldp module) then names the actual YANG branches — lldp, remote-statistics, local-system-data, port, management-address-tx-port, tx-statistics, rx-statistics, remote-system-data — so you can map each diagram box to a subtree.
blocks.zh: 信息模型分为两个视角。条款 12.2.1（LLDP UML）展示每代理或每机箱级别的对象：YANG 根层次把 LLDP 与 LLDP-Port 对象同 IETF 接口管理并列放置。条款 12.2.2（LLDP 端口 UML）则聚焦单个端口，其中可见可配置叶子节点（admin-status、tlvs-tx-enable、各计时乘数、management-address-tx-port）以及只读运行数据（port-id、tx-statistics、rx-statistics，以及保存邻居所通告内容的 remote-systems-data 表）。条款 12.3.1（ieee802-dot1ab-lldp 模块的结构）随后列出真正的 YANG 分支——lldp、remote-statistics、local-system-data、port、management-address-tx-port、tx-statistics、rx-statistics、remote-system-data——使你能把图中每个框对应到一棵子树。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 460 230" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><rect x="170" y="10" width="120" height="30" rx="4"/><text x="230" y="29" text-anchor="middle" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="12">module: lldp</text><line x1="230" y1="40" x2="230" y2="60"/><rect x="30" y="60" width="120" height="28" rx="4"/><text x="90" y="78" text-anchor="middle" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10">remote-statistics (ro)</text><rect x="170" y="60" width="120" height="28" rx="4"/><text x="230" y="78" text-anchor="middle" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10">local-system-data (ro)</text><rect x="310" y="60" width="120" height="28" rx="4"/><text x="370" y="78" text-anchor="middle" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10">port* [key] (rw)</text><line x1="230" y1="45" x2="90" y2="60"/><line x1="230" y1="45" x2="370" y2="60"/><line x1="370" y1="88" x2="370" y2="108"/><rect x="250" y="108" width="95" height="26" rx="4"/><text x="297" y="125" text-anchor="middle" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9">tx/rx-statistics (ro)</text><rect x="355" y="108" width="95" height="26" rx="4"/><text x="402" y="125" text-anchor="middle" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9">mgmt-addr-tx (rw)</text><line x1="370" y1="95" x2="297" y2="108"/><line x1="370" y1="95" x2="402" y2="108"/><line x1="370" y1="134" x2="370" y2="154"/><rect x="305" y="154" width="140" height="26" rx="4"/><text x="375" y="171" text-anchor="middle" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9">remote-systems-data* (ro)</text><rect x="30" y="195" width="400" height="26" rx="4" stroke-dasharray="4 3"/><text x="230" y="212" text-anchor="middle" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10">rw = config (read-write)   ro = state (read-only)</text></svg>

caption.en: Simplified tree of the ieee802-dot1ab-lldp YANG module (Clause 12.3.1): a top-level lldp container holds read-only statistics and local data plus a keyed list of ports; each port carries config leaves and read-only statistics and a remote-systems-data table of neighbor advertisements.
caption.zh: ieee802-dot1ab-lldp YANG 模块的简化树（条款 12.3.1）：顶层 lldp 容器包含只读统计与本地数据，以及一个带键的端口列表；每个端口承载配置叶子节点、只读统计，以及记录邻居通告的 remote-systems-data 表。

blocks.en: Clause 12.4 (Relationship to other YANG modules) lists everything the LLDP module imports, because YANG models are built from reusable pieces. Clause 12.4.1 (IEEE LLDP Types Module) — the ieee802-dot1ab-types module supplies reusable types for the LLDP module. Clause 12.4.2 (IETF Routing Module) — only the address-family identity from ietf-routing (IETF RFC 8349) is borrowed, as the base for address families. Clause 12.4.3 (IETF YANG Types Module) — ietf-yang-types (IETF RFC 6991) gives derived types like timestamp, timeticks, zero-based-counter, and counter. Clause 12.4.4 (IETF Interfaces YANG Module) — ietf-interfaces (IETF RFC 8343) models a port as an interface. Clause 12.4.5 (IEEE 802 Types Module) — ieee802-types supplies common reusable types such as the MAC-address type (with a noted upper/lower-case comparison caveat).
blocks.zh: 条款 12.4（与其他 YANG 模块的关系）列出 LLDP 模块导入的全部内容，因为 YANG 模型由可复用的部件搭建而成。条款 12.4.1（IEEE LLDP 类型模块）——ieee802-dot1ab-types 模块为 LLDP 模块提供可复用类型。条款 12.4.2（IETF 路由模块）——仅从 ietf-routing（IETF RFC 8349）借用地址族标识（address-family identity），作为地址族的基础。条款 12.4.3（IETF YANG 类型模块）——ietf-yang-types（IETF RFC 6991）提供 timestamp、timeticks、zero-based-counter、counter 等派生类型。条款 12.4.4（IETF 接口 YANG 模块）——ietf-interfaces（IETF RFC 8343）把端口建模为一个接口。条款 12.4.5（IEEE 802 类型模块）——ieee802-types 提供 MAC 地址类型等通用可复用类型（并指出大小写比较的注意事项）。

blocks.en:
flowchart TD
  L[ieee802-dot1ab-lldp] --> T[ieee802-dot1ab-types]
  L --> Y[ietf-yang-types: counters, timestamps]
  L --> I[ietf-interfaces: port as interface]
  L --> R[ietf-routing: address-family]
  L --> E[ieee802-types: mac-address]
blocks.zh:
flowchart TD
  L[ieee802-dot1ab-lldp] --> T[ieee802-dot1ab-types]
  L --> Y[ietf-yang-types：计数器、时间戳]
  L --> I[ietf-interfaces：端口即接口]
  L --> R[ietf-routing：地址族]
  L --> E[ieee802-types：MAC 地址]

blocks.en: Clause 12.5 (Security considerations) reminds you that these YANG modules are meant to be accessed over a secure network configuration protocol — for NETCONF, the lowest layer is a secure transport and the mandatory-to-implement secure transport is SSH (Secure Shell), with the NETCONF access control model restricting who can do what. Clause 12.5.1 (Security considerations of the ieee802-dot1ab-lldp module) gets specific: it enumerates the writable objects (the timing multipliers, port admin-status, tlvs-tx-enable, management-address-tx-port settings) that an attacker could manipulate to return incorrect neighbor information or cause a denial-of-service, and warns that readable data like system-name and remote-system details can leak network topology and is a privacy concern, so all access — including NETCONF get and get-config — should be controlled and possibly encrypted.
blocks.zh: 条款 12.5（安全考量）提醒：这些 YANG 模块应通过安全的网络配置协议访问——对 NETCONF 而言，最底层是安全传输层，且强制实现的安全传输是 SSH（安全外壳协议，Secure Shell），并由 NETCONF 访问控制模型限制谁能执行哪些操作。条款 12.5.1（ieee802-dot1ab-lldp 模块的安全考量）更为具体：它列举了可写对象（各计时乘数、端口 admin-status、tlvs-tx-enable、management-address-tx-port 设置），攻击者可借此返回错误的邻居信息或制造拒绝服务；并警告 system-name、远程系统详情等可读数据可能泄露网络拓扑、属于隐私威胁，因此所有访问（包括 NETCONF 的 get 与 get-config）都应受控，必要时还应加密。

blocks.en: Clause 12.6 (Definition of the YANG modules) is where the formal text lives. Clause 12.6.1 (YANG schema definitions) presents the simplified tree diagram with its symbol key — brackets [ ] enclose list keys, 'rw' means configuration read-write, 'ro' means read-only state, '?' marks an optional node, '*' denotes a list — followed by 12.6.1.1, the full schema tree for the ieee802-dot1ab-lldp module (including the remote-table-change notification). Clause 12.6.2 (YANG data model definitions) then prints the actual module source: 12.6.2.1 the ieee802-types module, 12.6.2.2 the ieee802-dot1ab-types module, and 12.6.2.3 the ieee802-dot1ab-lldp module itself. A copyright release lets implementers freely reproduce these modules.
blocks.zh: 条款 12.6（YANG 模块的定义）承载正式文本。条款 12.6.1（YANG 模式定义）给出带符号说明的简化树图——方括号 [ ] 包围列表键，“rw” 表示可读写配置，“ro” 表示只读状态，“?” 标记可选节点，“*” 表示列表——随后是 12.6.1.1，即 ieee802-dot1ab-lldp 模块的完整模式树（含 remote-table-change 通知）。条款 12.6.2（YANG 数据模型定义）接着印出模块源代码本身：12.6.2.1 是 ieee802-types 模块，12.6.2.2 是 ieee802-dot1ab-types 模块，12.6.2.3 则是 ieee802-dot1ab-lldp 模块本身。版权放行声明允许实现者自由复制这些模块。

summary.en: Coverage map: every clause in this lesson, by number
summary.zh: 覆盖图谱：本课逐条对应的条款编号

blocks.en: Clause 1.2 (Purpose): adds goal (e) — provide YANG configuration and operational models for Station and MAC Connectivity Discovery. Clause 3.1 (Definitions): new terms YANG, YANG model, YANG module. Clause 5.3 (Required capabilities): rewritten item n) and new item o) making Clause 12 binding when YANG is claimed. Clause 9.2.5 (Per-Agent variables): 9.2.5.6 msgTxHold restated as the multiplier yielding txTTL. Clause 12.1 (Internet Standard Management Framework): RFC 7950 language; URN namespace per 802d. Clause 12.2.1 (LLDP UML) and 12.2.2 (LLDP Port UML): per-agent and per-port object views derived from TLVs and agent variables. Clause 12.3.1 (Structure of ieee802-dot1ab-lldp module): named YANG subtrees. Clause 12.4.1 (IEEE LLDP Types), 12.4.2 (IETF Routing — address-family), 12.4.3 (IETF YANG Types — counters/timestamps), 12.4.4 (IETF Interfaces — port as interface), 12.4.5 (IEEE 802 Types — mac-address). Clause 12.5.1 (Security considerations of the lldp module): writable knobs as attack surface, readable data as privacy concern, control all access. Clause 12.6.1 (YANG schema definitions) and 12.6.1.1: tree-diagram symbol key + full schema tree. Clause 12.6.2 (YANG data model definitions): module source for ieee802-types, ieee802-dot1ab-types, ieee802-dot1ab-lldp. Annex A (normative, PICS proforma): new rows in A.4 — does the implementation support YANG management; are the ieee802-dot1ab-lldp and ieee802-dot1ab-types modules supported. Annex D (informative, Bibliography): adds [B13] IETF RFC 8126 and [B14] IETF RFC 8040 (RESTCONF).
blocks.zh: 条款 1.2（目的）：新增目标 (e)——为站点与 MAC 连通性发现提供 YANG 配置模型和运行模型。条款 3.1（定义）：新增术语 YANG、YANG 模型、YANG 模块。条款 5.3（必备能力）：改写第 n) 项并新增第 o) 项，使声明支持 YANG 时第 12 条具约束力。条款 9.2.5（每代理变量）：9.2.5.6 msgTxHold 被重申为生成 txTTL 的乘数。条款 12.1（互联网标准管理框架）：使用 RFC 7950 语言；按 802d 的 URN 命名空间。条款 12.2.1（LLDP UML）与 12.2.2（LLDP 端口 UML）：源自 TLV 与代理变量的每代理和每端口对象视图。条款 12.3.1（ieee802-dot1ab-lldp 模块结构）：列名 YANG 子树。条款 12.4.1（IEEE LLDP 类型）、12.4.2（IETF 路由——地址族）、12.4.3（IETF YANG 类型——计数器/时间戳）、12.4.4（IETF 接口——端口即接口）、12.4.5（IEEE 802 类型——MAC 地址）。条款 12.5.1（lldp 模块安全考量）：可写旋钮构成攻击面，可读数据涉及隐私，应控制全部访问。条款 12.6.1（YANG 模式定义）与 12.6.1.1：树图符号说明与完整模式树。条款 12.6.2（YANG 数据模型定义）：ieee802-types、ieee802-dot1ab-types、ieee802-dot1ab-lldp 的模块源代码。附录 A（规范性，PICS 形式表）：A.4 新增行——实现是否支持 YANG 管理；是否支持 ieee802-dot1ab-lldp 与 ieee802-dot1ab-types 模块。附录 D（资料性，参考文献）：新增 [B13] IETF RFC 8126 与 [B14] IETF RFC 8040（RESTCONF）。

blocks.en: Annex A (normative) PICS proforma and Annex D (informative) Bibliography close the loop: Annex A gives the conformance checklist (a vendor literally ticks 'Yes/No' for YANG support and for each of the two modules), while Annex D simply records the new references the amendment depends on, including RESTCONF (IETF RFC 8040). 'Normative' means binding; 'informative' means context only.
blocks.zh: 附录 A（规范性）PICS 形式表与附录 D（资料性）参考文献为本课收尾：附录 A 给出一致性核对清单（厂商对“是否支持 YANG”以及两个模块逐一打勾“是/否”），而附录 D 仅记录修订标准所依赖的新参考文献，包括 RESTCONF（IETF RFC 8040）。“规范性”意为具约束力，“资料性”意为仅供参考。

cites.note: Clause 1.2 Purpose — goal (e) adds YANG configuration/operational models.
Clause 3.1 Definitions — YANG, YANG model, YANG module.
Clause 5.3 Required capabilities — rewritten n), new o).
Clause 12.1–12.3.1 framework, information model UMLs, module structure.
Clause 12.6.1/12.6.1.1 schema tree and symbol key; 12.6.2 module definitions.
Annex A (normative) PICS proforma — new A.4 YANG rows.
